title: Baapu Ni Manda Mera
desc: A superstitious patriarch believes his family is cursed to lose newborns. However, he hopes their daughter-in-law will break the curse after giving birth to her child.

title: Vadhayiyaan Ji Vadhayiyaan
desc: Pargat persuades Gagan's father and obtains her hand in marriage. However, a jubilant night obscures his view, casting a shadow over their imminent union.

title: Rose Rosy Te Gulab
desc: Unhappy with being single, Gulab takes his friends' advice and sets out to find a life partner. However, things become awkward when he ends up in a love triangle with Rose and Rosy.

title: Mittran Da Challeya Truck Ni
desc: Satta, a truck driver, wants a wife to help run his life. However, Jindi likes money and nice things, so when they meet, their odd relationship breaks all the usual love story rules.

title: Guddiyan Patole
desc: Two sisters, who live in Canada, return to their village to meet their maternal family. Hilarity ensues when they end up taking their grandmother on an impromptu trip.

title: Goreyan Nu Daffa Karo
desc: A man from Punjab, Kala, falls head over heels for the Indo-Canadian Aleesha and has his heart set on marrying her. But when his conventional family starts causing trouble he fights for his love.

title: Bailaras
desc: A simple man pursues his dreams of finding his true love, keeping his family together, and winning a tractor contest with his beloved Bailaras tractor.

title: Rocky Mental
desc: Rajdeep's, a boxer's, life starts falling apart when he is falsely accused for raping his girlfriend and his best friend supposedly commits suicide.

title: Oh Yaara... Ainvayi Ainvayi Lut Gaya
desc: Upon falling deeply in love with each other, Ranbir and Gunjan get married. However, when several complications causes problems in their marriage, they get into a chaotic divorce.

title: Speaker Kharke
desc: A comprehensive compilation presents some of the best and most popular songs from movies in the Punjabi film industry played back to back.

title: Speaker Kharke
desc: A comprehensive compilation presents some of the best and most popular songs from movies in the Punjabi film industry played back to back.

title: Dustbin
desc: After discovering a contraceptive in his dustbin that does not belong to him, a man strives to uncover the truth, which complicates his married life.

title: Je Jatt Vigarh Gya
desc: Daler, a young man with anger issues whose life takes a drastic turn when he tries to bring his pregnant sister back home.

title: Jatt Brothers
desc: Jaggi and Pamma are best friends who engage in a fierce competition with each other in order to prove their affection to the women they love.

title: Rabb Da Radio 2
desc: When a newly-wed couple, Manjinder and Guddi, return to Manjinder's hometown, they find that his extended family consisting of four maternal uncles have split and gone their separate ways.

title: Khaao Piyo Aish Karo
desc: Cousins Jeeta and Mitha get into occasional conflicts due to their contrasting values and lifestyles. However, situations turn erratic when one of them commits a blunder.

title: Lambran da Laana
desc: A family finds itself entangled with a forty year old curse that haunts their village. As they search for a possible solution to get rid of the hex, they discover some hidden secrets.

title: Criminal
desc: A couple on the verge of a bitter divorce are locked in their own house with five convicts who have escaped from prison.
